pairs.ch: 我聽到她痛苦地尖叫，馬上請醫療人員前來幫忙。
pairs.en: I heard her scream in pain and immediately asked the medical staff for help.

pairs.ch: 我們注意到 Tim 把所有時間都投入於訓練，因為他一心一意想成為冠軍。
pairs.en: We noticed Tim dedicating all his time to training since he had his heart set on becoming a champion.

pairs.ch: 儘管失敗過很多次，我們團隊最終成功說服這位客戶。
pairs.en: In spite of many failures, our team finally succeeded in convincing the client.

pairs.ch: 儘管人手不足，這間醫院仍提供了立即的協助。
pairs.en: Despite the lack of staff, the hospital still provided immediate support.

pairs.ch: 儘管我妹妹面臨這些挑戰，她仍努力完成她的科學專題。(My sister...despite....)
pairs.en: My sister struggled to finish her science project despite the challenges she faced.

pairs.ch: 有個實驗室的研究人員正在研究不同的調味料。(There is....)
pairs.en: There is a lab where researchers are doing studying different flavorings.

pairs.ch: 我們家喜歡那間餐廳，那裡所有的食材都來自有機農場。
pairs.en: Our family likes the restaurant where all the ingredients come from organic farms.

pairs.ch: 我永遠不會忘記那一天，當時我想出了解決那個問題的辦法。
pairs.en: I'll never forget the day when I came up with a solution to the problem.

pairs.ch: 這次的廣播通知不像上次那樣明確，所以許多乘客感到困惑。
pairs.en: The announcement wasn't as clear as the previous one, so many passengers felt confused.

pairs.ch: 這款智慧型手機沒有前一代(the previous generation)那麼多功能，但用起來更簡單。
pairs.en: This smartphone doesn't have as many functions as the previous generation, but it's easier to use.

pairs.ch: 我早就把打翻的牛奶清乾淨了，但媽媽仍勃然大怒。
pairs.en: I had already cleaned up the spilled milk, but my Mom still flew into a rage.

pairs.ch: Cindy 早已描述過那名嫌疑犯的外貌，所以警方很快就認出他。
pairs.en: Cindy had already described the suspect's appearance, so the police recognized him quickly.

pairs.ch: 我在想他是否能夠專注在自己的科學研究上。
pairs.en: I was wondering if he could concentrate on his scientific research.

pairs.ch: 我一直想知道 Peter 是否真的是那麼固執。
pairs.en: I've always wondered if Peter is really that stubborn.

pairs.ch: 我不清楚 Lucy 是否還懊悔之前說的那些話。
pairs.en: I don't know if Lucy still regretted what she had said.
